statement.en: Lean 4 progress: Batch 5 Algebra Bundle — 12 theorems/lemmas, 0 sorry, 0 axiom
statement.ja: Lean 4 進捗: Batch 5 Algebra Bundle — 定理 12 / sorry 0 / axiom 0
statement.headerDoc:
STEP Batch 5 — Perfect numbers + Algebra + Algebraic geometry
  ==============================================================

  Concise bundled Lean 4 for unsolved problems in:
    - Perfect number families (8 sub-types)
    - Algebra 8 conjectures (Hadamard / Jacobson / Köthe etc.)
    - Algebraic geometry 6 conjectures (Andre-Oort / Bass / etc.)

  Most statements are meta-level (existence/infinitude of families) and
  cannot be Lean-verified beyond small concrete instances.
  This file collects basic definitions + known small examples.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Zero-sorry verified by lake env lean
